overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban commercial street. The player witnesses a fight between two men, then continues past bodies and debris, observing the cyberpunk cityscape with large digital billboards and the 'El Dorado Pawn Shop'.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial pedestrian street with digital billboards

events.description: man in white tank top punches the other man, knocking him unconscious to the ground
camera walks past the fallen man and continues down the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit street toward two men arguing ahead

notable_agents.action: man in brown jacket arguing aggressively and gesturing with his hands
man in white tank top with tattoos arguing, then punching the other man to the ground

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying a woman in purple clothing with '15%' text
yellow and black signage for El Dorado Pawn Shop visible down the street
stacked wooden cargo containers and bags on the sidewalk
rectangular planter with bamboo plants and purple neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow neon-lit commercial street with tall buildings covered in digital billboards. Two men are arguing in the center of the path - one in a brown jacket and another in a white tank top. At around 8 seconds, the man in the tank top punches the other man, knocking him to the ground. The camera continues walking past the fallen man toward the El Dorado Pawn Shop sign visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with trash piles and bodies on the ground

events.description: camera approaches a man crouching over a body, apparently looting or checking the body

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, observing the urban decay and bodies lying on the ground

notable_agents.action: man in beige shirt crouching over a body, searching through the person's belongings

entered.detail: large pile of black garbage bags and debris stacked against the building wall
large digital advertisement for Cola with bright animated graphics

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the commercial street, passing unconscious bodies lying on the wet pavement. The El Dorado Pawn Shop sign grows larger ahead. Around 20 seconds, the camera approaches a man in a beige shirt crouching over a body near a large pile of trash bags. The Cola billboard becomes visible on the left side as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with metal stairs and multiple digital billboards

events.description: camera approaches two women standing over a body near the stairs
camera turns left at the intersection, passing the women and heading down a side street

agents.ego_description: walking forward then turning left at the intersection, passing two women standing over a fallen person

notable_agents.action: two women standing over a body on the ground, one appears to be checking the body while the other stands guard

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with colorful anime-style characters and Japanese text reading 'Splash Machtazo'
metal staircase with closed shutter leading up to an upper level of the building

segments.scene_description: The camera continues past the looter and approaches an intersection where two women stand over another body near a metal staircase. Large anime-style billboards cover the building facades. At around 42 seconds, the camera turns left, passing the women and revealing more digital advertisements including the purple woman billboard seen earlier, now from a different angle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial street that shifts from a scene of sudden violence to a wider observation of urban decay. It begins on a narrow path flanked by digital billboards, where a confrontation between two men culminates in a punch that knocks one to the ground. As the camera moves past the fallen man, the environment opens up to reveal wet pavement littered with unconscious bodies and the glowing sign of the El Dorado Pawn Shop growing larger ahead. The scene then shifts toward a man in a beige shirt crouching over a body near a pile of trash bags, while a large Cola billboard emerges on the left. Finally, the camera passes two women standing over another body near a metal staircase before turning left to reveal a dense array of anime-style advertisements and a purple woman billboard.
